## What

Briefly describe the change.

## Why

Explain the problem, requirement, or integration gap this PR addresses.

## Tests / Verification

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `docker compose build`
- [ ] `make demo` or reason not needed:
- [ ] Other:

## Docs / Contracts

- [ ] `docs/progress.md` updated
- [ ] `docs/changelog.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] `docs/walkthrough.md` / `infra/runbook.md` updated if commands or ops changed
- [ ] `docs/interfaces/*` updated if API/WS/replay contracts changed
- [ ] ADR added or updated if an architecture decision changed

## Scope Guard

- [ ] No unrelated Stream A/B/C rewrites
- [ ] No new dependency without ADR/rationale
- [ ] ADR 0009 not closed without real scipy-vs-XGBoost backtest numbers
